mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, phone, role, status, identity_audit_status, teacher_audit_status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, #{identityAuditStatus}, #{teacherAuditStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET identity_audit_status = #{status}, identity_audit_remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET teacher_audit_status = #{status}, teacher_audit_remark = #{remark}, role = #{newRole}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET teacher_intro = #{teacherIntro}, teacher_material_url = #{teacherMaterialUrl}, teacher_cert_url = #{teacherCertUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE identity_audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE teacher_audit_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM sys_user
AND role = #{role}
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.dayDate, '%m-%d') AS dateLabel, t.totalCount AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS dayDate, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM sys_user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) t ORDER BY t.dayDate
